standardization_notes: All per-share metrics (DE/share, EPS) converted to USD using period-end FX rates
AUM metrics were already collected in USD by tier collectors — no additional conversion needed
Percentage, ratio, index, and bps metrics are currency-neutral — no conversion applied
Non-calendar fiscal year firms (STEP, HLNE, ICP: March 31 FY end) flagged; nearest CY2025 data used where available
FRE definition heterogeneity documented per firm; European equivalents (Fee-related EBITDA, Management Fee Earnings, Underlying EBITDA) noted
Low coverage threshold: < 15 of 25 firms reporting
Outlier threshold: > 2 standard deviations from cross-sectional mean

EUR.source: ECB reference rate / tier 2 data collector

GBP.source: Bank of England / tier 2-3 data collectors

CHF.source: SNB reference rate / tier 2 data collector

BRL.source: BCB / tier 3 data collector (1 BRL ~ 0.167 USD)

currency_conversion.conversion_approach: Period-end (Dec 31, 2025) exchange rates. For per-share metrics, raw local-currency values converted at these rates. AUM and valuation multiples were pre-converted to USD by data collectors.
metrics_already_usd: MET-VD-005 (Total AUM) — pre-converted by data collectors
metrics_currency_neutral: MET-VD-003 through MET-VD-017 (percentages, ratios, indices, bps) — no conversion needed

STEP.alignment_method: Q3 FY2026 (quarter ended Dec 2025) used as proxy for CY2025 where available; LTM metrics approximated

HLNE.alignment_method: Q3 FY2026 (quarter ended Dec 2025) used as proxy for CY2025 where available; YTD 9-month data annualized

ICP.alignment_method: FY2025 (ended March 2025) used with Q3 FY2026 (Dec 2025) AUM update; earnings metrics lag by ~9 months

fiscal_year_alignment.alignment_note: Most firms report on a calendar year (Dec 31). Non-calendar firms use nearest available data aligned to CY2025 where possible. Data periods are documented per firm.

fre_definition_reconciliation.summary: FRE is a non-GAAP metric with material definitional differences across firms. Key variations: (1) pre-tax vs after-tax, (2) inclusion/exclusion of equity-based compensation, (3) treatment of transaction/advisory fees, (4) European equivalents use IFRS-based operating profit proxies.

BX.label: Fee-Related Earnings
BX.definition: Management fees + fee-related performance revenues - base compensation - operating expenses - non-compensation G&A. Pre-tax. Includes equity-based compensation as expense.

BAM.label: Fee-Related Earnings
BAM.definition: Base management fees minus operating costs of the AM segment. Shared platform with BN. Pre-equity-based compensation.

BN.label: Fee-Related Earnings (via BAM)
BN.definition: Uses BAM's FRE for AM segment. BN is a holding company — FRE covers only the AM business, not insurance or operating businesses.

APO.label: Fee-Related Earnings
APO.definition: Management fees + advisory/transaction fees - compensation - non-compensation expenses. Includes Athene-related fee revenue. After equity-based comp.

KKR.label: Fee-Related Earnings
KKR.definition: Management fees + transaction/monitoring fees + capital markets fees - compensation - other expenses. Includes Global Atlantic insurance-related fee revenue. After equity-based comp.

ARES.label: Fee-Related Earnings
ARES.definition: Management fees + other net fee revenue - compensation - G&A. After equity-based compensation. Realized income metric used as DE proxy.

CG.label: Fee-Related Earnings
CG.definition: Fund management fees + portfolio advisory fees - compensation - G&A. Pre-tax.

OWL.label: Fee-Related Earnings
OWL.definition: Management fees + administrative/transaction fees - compensation - G&A. After equity-based compensation.

TPG.label: Fee-Related Earnings
TPG.definition: Management fees + monitoring fees - compensation - other expenses. After equity-based compensation.

EQT.label: Fee-related EBITDA
EQT.definition: Management fees - personnel costs - other operating expenses. European equivalent of FRE. Before D&A. IFRS-based.

STEP.label: Fee-Related Earnings
STEP.definition: Management and advisory fees - compensation - G&A. Standard US alt manager FRE definition. March 31 fiscal year.

HLNE.label: Fee-Related Earnings
HLNE.definition: Management and advisory fees - compensation - G&A. Standard US alt manager FRE definition. March 31 fiscal year.

GCMG.label: Fee-Related Earnings
GCMG.definition: Management fees + administrative fees - compensation - G&A. After equity-based comp.

CVC.label: Management Fee Earnings
CVC.definition: Management fees - personnel costs - other opex. European equivalent of FRE. EUR-denominated. IFRS-based.

PGHN.label: Management Fee-Related Earnings
PGHN.definition: Management fees + other revenues - personnel expenses - other operating expenses. CHF-denominated. IFRS-based.

ICP.label: Fund Management Company Profit
ICP.definition: Management fees - operating costs. GBP-denominated. IFRS-based. March 31 fiscal year.

EMG.label: Net Management Fee Revenue / Core FRE
EMG.definition: Net management fees - fixed compensation - core operating costs. Hedge fund manager model — lower margin than PE/credit peers.

BPT.label: Underlying EBITDA
BPT.definition: Management fees + carried interest - personnel costs - other costs. GBP-denominated. European PE-focused. Pre-D&A.

PAX.label: Fee-Related Earnings
PAX.definition: Management fees + advisory fees - personnel costs - G&A - SBC. USD-denominated. Includes GPMS, credit, RE, PE, and infra segments.

VINP.label: Fee-Related Earnings
VINP.definition: Management fees + advisory fees - personnel - G&A. BRL-denominated but reported in USD. Brazilian alt manager.

RPC.label: Fee-Related Earnings
RPC.definition: Management fees - compensation - other operating expenses. USD-denominated. Permanent capital vehicle manager.

TKO.label: Fee-Related Earnings
TKO.definition: Management fees - operating expenses. EUR-denominated. Tikehau Capital — European multi-strategy.

ANTIN.label: Fee-Related Earnings
ANTIN.definition: Management fees - personnel costs - other opex. EUR-denominated. Pure-play infrastructure GP.

III.label: Net Management Fee Revenue
III.definition: Management fees - operating costs. GBP-denominated. 3i is a listed PE firm with direct balance sheet investments — FRE concept is approximate. FY ends March 31.

RF.label: Fee-Related Earnings
RF.definition: Management fees - compensation - operating expenses. EUR-denominated. Rithm/Sculptor heritage — real estate focused.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + advisory fees - personnel costs - G&A - SBC. USD-denominated. Includes GPMS, credit, RE, PE, and infra segments.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + fee-related performance revenues - base compensation - operating expenses - non-compensation G&A. Pre-tax. Includes equity-based compensation as expense.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + transaction/monitoring fees + capital markets fees - compensation - other expenses. Includes Global Atlantic insurance-related fee revenue. After equity-based comp.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + advisory/transaction fees - compensation - non-compensation expenses. Includes Athene-related fee revenue. After equity-based comp.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + other net fee revenue - compensation - G&A. After equity-based compensation. Realized income metric used as DE proxy.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Base management fees minus operating costs of the AM segment. Shared platform with BN. Pre-equity-based compensation.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings (via BAM)
fre_definition.definition: Uses BAM's FRE for AM segment. BN is a holding company — FRE covers only the AM business, not insurance or operating businesses.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + administrative/transaction fees - compensation - G&A. After equity-based compensation.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management fees + monitoring fees - compensation - other expenses. After equity-based compensation.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Fund management fees + portfolio advisory fees - compensation - G&A. Pre-tax.

fre_definition.label: Fee-Related Earnings
fre_definition.definition: Management and advisory fees - compensation - G&A. Standard US alt manager FRE definition. March 31 fiscal year.

fre_definition.label: Management Fee-Related Earnings

fiscal_year_flag.alignment_method: Calendar year. Man Group reports in USD despite UK headquarters.

fre_definition.label: Management Fee Earnings

fre_definition.definition: Management fees - personnel costs - other opex. EUR-denominated. Pure-play infrastructure GP.
